title: stipa australis
intro: Stipa australis, also known as Wallaby Grass, is a species of grass native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stipa australis are said to include relieving digestive issues and reducing fever, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Stipa australis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
